Home.heroTitle: Your specialist for installations and renovation in Amsterdam
Home.heroSubtitle: From plumbing and electrical work to complete bathroom and kitchen renovations. AZGS delivers professional results, fast response and fair pricing.
Home.featuresSubtitle: We combine technical expertise with reliable scheduling and clear communication throughout every project.
Home.feature1Text: For breakdowns and emergencies we are typically on-site within 1–2 hours in Amsterdam and surroundings, including outside office hours.
Home.feature2Text: You always receive a written quote before work begins. No unexpected costs, no hidden charges at the end of the job.
Home.feature3Text: Installations and renovations handled by one team. Less coordination, better planning, one point of contact.
Home.ctaBannerText: Call us or send a message. We respond within 1 hour on working days and are available 24/7 for emergencies.
Home.servicesSectionSubtitle: AZGS provides both technical installation services and complete renovation projects in Amsterdam and surrounding areas.

services.title: Technical Installations
services.description: Plumbing, electrical, heating, ventilation, air conditioning, underfloor heating, boiler installation and heat pumps. Certified and compliant with Dutch standards.

services.title: Renovation
services.description: Bathroom and kitchen renovations, drywall, painting, plastering, flooring and tiling. From minor adjustments to complete project renovations.

Home.emergencyDescription: Leak, electrical fault or boiler breakdown? Our emergency line is available day and night. On-site within 1–2 hours in Amsterdam.
